Source URL: https://www.sbdc.uh.edu/sbdc/Technology_Innovation.asp

# SBDC Technology Commercialization

## Resource type
Technology innovation and commercialization support.

## Resource summary
Use for high-tech ventures needing prototyping/testing, market research, funding proposal prep, presentation readiness, market viability, competition analysis, market strategy, elevator pitch, and funding-source discovery.

## BOSS routing use
Use this when the user's need matches the topic. Ask enough discovery questions to determine readiness before routing to a specialized program.

## Guardrails
Do not guarantee funding, contracts, certifications, export legality, grant awards, loan approval, or technical feasibility. Route to official advisors and professionals.
